channel.title: NearNow Mobile Local News
channel.description: Area-aware local headlines sourced from public RSS feeds for NearNow readers. The live site generates this feed dynamically from AL.com Mobile and other local sources selected by area.

item.title: NearNow RSS feed is area-aware
item.description: The deployed NearNow RSS feed is generated from local RSS sources based on the area query. Mobile uses AL.com Mobile, with a fallback to AL.com headlines filtered for Mobile and Baldwin County terms.
